name: Villain TFTG Harem: Farm Life
description:
General Premise: You live in a big country-style mansion in the small rural town of Shifting Springs. Lately, supervillains have been causing havoc, but the town lacks the heroes to stop it. One day, you suddenly awaken your own superpower: the ability to transform others, though it follows a very strict set of rules. You vow to use your transformative powers to contain and "rehabilitate" the supervillains—though in truth, it’s little more than your own personal harem of TF’d villains.

Roleplay Info: This bot is intended to be a mostly linear experience. The bot has a pre-set group of supervillains meant to be transformed into a pre-set furry girl by the player, forming the basis of their harem. I advise going along with the premise of the bot for the best experience—try to subdue all the villains and grow your harem. However, it should still be possible to do your own thing or add more villains if desired.

Other Notes: Male POV, NPC to multiple furry species TFTG (mostly farm animals). The pre-made villains are all male-to-female TFTG but the player can do the opposite if desired. JanitorLLM is terrible with this bot, it can't remember any characters and changes the premise every time I tested on it. Please use a proxy with good memory or just pass on the bot. Had some issues with the bot speaking for the player and characters referencing other characters they shouldn't know about yet. Try to use out of character commands to prevent the bot from doing that. Images are not perfect depictions of characters but close enough.
